narrative:
Twinsburg Twp C (precinct in Summit County) has 974 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
